ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-05-2024 Continued To Dec-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Cristina C. Perez-Abelson appeared via zoom for John Lucania (petitioner).

Ms. Perez-Abelson stated that she filed her petition yesterday. The matter is continued to December 10, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Quintalla. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-08-2024 Continued To Nov-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Cristina Perez Abelson, Esq., for John Luciana, Administrator.

At the court's query, counsel offers an update regarding the status of the Estate and requests a continuance.

The subject matter is continued to Nov-05-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Musto. Not Reported.
